title: Tunisian Chickpea Pilaf
description: A flavorful and nutritious pilaf dish from Tunisia, made with chickpeas and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the chickpeas and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the pilaf and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and cover. Simmer for 20 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in the chopped parsley.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
